---
title: "Tools"
description: "Open-source tools for mass spectrometry-based proteomics, developed by the CompOmics group at VIB-UGent."
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="tools-page">
  <header class="tools-head">
    <div class="tools-head-kicker">Software</div>
    <h1 class="tools-head-title">Tools</h1>
    <p class="tools-head-sub">Open-source software for mass spectrometry-based proteomics. All tools are freely available under permissive licences — source on <a href="https://github.com/compomics">GitHub</a>.</p>
  </header>

  <div class="tools-toolbar">
    <div class="tools-search">
      <i class="bi bi-search tools-search-icon" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      <input type="search" id="tools-search-input" class="tools-search-input"
             placeholder="Search tools…" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false"
             aria-label="Search tools">
      <button type="button" class="tools-search-clear" id="tools-search-clear" aria-label="Clear search" hidden>&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="tools-chips" id="tools-chips" role="group" aria-label="Filter by category">
      <button type="button" class="tools-chip is-active" data-cat="all">All</button>
      <button type="button" class="tools-chip" data-cat="prediction" style="--cat: var(--cat-prediction)">Prediction</button>
      <button type="button" class="tools-chip" data-cat="identification" style="--cat: var(--cat-identification)">Identification</button>
      <button type="button" class="tools-chip" data-cat="support" style="--cat: var(--cat-support)">Support</button>
      <button type="button" class="tools-chip" data-cat="biological" style="--cat: var(--cat-biological)">Interpretation</button>
      <button type="button" class="tools-chip" data-cat="metaproteomics" style="--cat: var(--cat-metaproteomics)">Metaproteomics</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="tools-count" id="tools-count" aria-live="polite"></div>
  <div class="tools-grid" id="tools-grid"></div>
  <div class="tools-empty" id="tools-empty" hidden>
    <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
    <p>No tools match your search.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="community-page">
  <header class="tools-head community-head">
    <div class="tools-head-kicker">Community</div>
    <h2 class="tools-head-title">Community projects</h2>
    <p class="tools-head-sub">Open, community-driven initiatives that CompOmics helps build and maintain, together with the wider proteomics community.</p>
  </header>
  <div class="community-grid" id="community-grid"></div>
</section>

<script>
(function () {
  // ── Category metadata ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const CATS = {
    prediction:     { label: 'Prediction' },
    identification: { label: 'Identification' },
    support:        { label: 'Support' },
    biological:     { label: 'Interpretation' },
    metaproteomics: { label: 'Metaproteomics' },
    community:      { label: 'Community' }
  };

  // ── Tool data — add a new tool by appending an object here ───────────────────
  // links keys (rendered in this order, always): github, docs, pypi, bioconda,
  //   web, api, paper, tutorial. Just add the ones a tool has — order is automatic.
  // devs: array of team image keys (assets/images/<key>.jpg)
  // logo (optional): filename in assets/images/tools/ (e.g. 'deeplc.png');
  //   shown in the icon slot, falls back to `icon` if missing. Omit to use icon.
  // comingSoon (optional): set true to show a "Coming soon" pill in the links row.
  const TOOLS = [
    // ── Prediction ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    {
      name: 'MS²PIP', cat: 'prediction', icon: 'bi-bar-chart-fill', logo: 'ms2pip.png',
      desc: 'Predicts MS² fragment-ion intensities from peptide sequence, for spectral libraries and rescoring.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/ms2pip',
        web: 'https://iomics.ugent.be/ms2pip/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gkad335',
        tutorial: '../tutorials/posts/2026-06-10-peptide-predictor.html',
      },
      devs: ['arthur', 'ralf']
    },
    {
      name: 'DeepLC', cat: 'prediction', icon: 'bi-clock-history', logo: 'deeplc.png',
      desc: 'Deep-learning retention-time prediction that generalises to peptides with unseen modifications.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/DeepLC',
        // docs: 'https://compomics.github.io/DeepLC',
        // pypi: 'https://pypi.org/project/deeplc/',
        // bioconda: 'https://bioconda.github.io/recipes/deeplc/README.html',
        web: 'https://iomics.ugent.be/deeplc/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-021-01301-5',
        tutorial: '../tutorials/posts/2026-06-10-peptide-predictor.html'
      },
      devs: ['robbin', 'ralf']
    },
    {
      name: 'iDeepLC', cat: 'prediction', icon: 'bi-clock-history', logo: 'ideeplc.png',
      desc: 'Retention-time prediction from peptide chemical structure (SMILES), generalising to modifications unseen during training.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/iDeepLC',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.analchem.5c08017',
      },
      devs: ['alireza', 'robbin']
    },
    {
      name: 'IM2Deep', cat: 'prediction', icon: 'bi-wind', logo: 'im2deep.svg',
      desc: 'Predicts collisional cross-section (CCS) values for peptides, including modified, and multiple conformations.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/im2deep',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.analchem.5c01142',
        tutorial: '../tutorials/posts/2026-06-10-peptide-predictor.html'
      },
      devs: ['robbe']
    },
    {
      name: 'IM2Fly', cat: 'prediction', icon: 'bi-rocket-takeoff', logo: 'im2fly.png', comingSoon: true,
      desc: 'Peptide flyability prediction for targeted mass spectrometry.', comingSoon: true,
      // links: { github: 'https://github.com/compomics' },
      devs: ['xuxa']
    },
    {
      name: 'MHC-3PO', cat: 'prediction', icon: 'bi-shield-shaded', logo: 'mhc3po.png',
      desc: 'Binding affinity predictions for HLA-bound immunopeptides, through graph neural networks and protein language models.', comingSoon: true,
      // links: { github: 'https://github.com/compomics' },
      devs: ['arthur']
    },

    // ── Identification ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    {
      name: 'MS²Rescore', cat: 'identification', icon: 'bi-arrow-repeat', logo: 'ms2rescore.png',
      desc: 'Rescores peptide-spectrum matches with predicted features to boost confident identifications.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/ms2rescore',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1016/j.mcpro.2022.100266',
        tutorial: '../tutorials/posts/2026-06-11-ms2rescore.qmd'
      },
      devs: ['ralf', 'arthur', 'robbin', 'robbe']
    },
      {
        name: 'SearchGUI', cat: 'identification', icon: 'bi-search', logo: 'searchgui.png',
        desc: 'A unified graphical interface to configure and run multiple proteomics search engines at once.',
        links: {
          github: 'https://github.com/compomics/searchgui',
          web: 'https://compomics.github.io/projects/searchgui.html',
          paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.8b00175',
        }
      },
    {
      name: 'PeptideShaker', cat: 'identification', icon: 'bi-grid-3x3-gap-fill', logo: 'peptideshaker.png',
      desc: 'Interactive visualisation and interpretation of peptide and protein identification results.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/peptide-shaker',
        web: 'https://compomics.github.io/projects/peptide-shaker.html',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1038/nbt.3109',
      }
    },
    {
      name: 'MSI-PICASSO', cat: 'identification', icon: 'bi-brush', logo: 'msipicasso.png',
      desc: 'FDR-controlled peptide-feature matching for MALDI mass spectrometry imaging.', comingSoon: true,
      links: {
      },
      devs: ['robbe']
    },

    // ── Support ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    {
      name: 'ThermoRawFileParser', cat: 'support', icon: 'bi-file-earmark-binary', logo: 'thermorawfileparser.png',
      desc: 'Converts Thermo .raw files to open formats (mzML, MGF, Parquet) on Windows, macOS, and Linux.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/ThermoRawFileParser',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.9b00328',
      }
    },
    {
      name: 'lesSDRF', cat: 'support', icon: 'bi-table', logo: 'lesSDRF.png',
      desc: 'Interactive app for ontology-compliant SDRF metadata annotation of proteomics experiments.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/lesSDRF',
        web: 'https://lessdrf.streamlit.app/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-023-42543-5',
      },
      devs: ['tine']
    },
    {
      name: 'psm_utils', cat: 'support', icon: 'bi-code-slash', logo: 'psmutils.png',
      desc: 'Python library for reading, writing, and handling identification data from any search engine.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics/psm_utils',
        docs: 'https://psm-utils.readthedocs.io',
      },
      devs: ['ralf']
    },
    {
      name: 'HAMLET', cat: 'support', icon: 'bi-robot',
      desc: 'Agentic, LLM-based tool that extracts proteomics metadata from manuscript text for downstream reuse.', comingSoon: true,
      // links: { github: 'https://github.com/compomics' },
      devs: ['hari', 'tine']
    },

    // ── Biological interpretation ────────────────────────────────────────────
    {
      name: 'Scop3P', cat: 'biological', icon: 'bi-diagram-3', logo: 'scop3p.png',
      desc: 'Comprehensive resource of human phosphosites mapped within their full structural context.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.0c00306',
      },
      devs: ['pathmanaban', 'natalia']
    },
    {
      name: 'Scop3PTM', cat: 'biological', icon: 'bi-diagram-3-fill', logo: 'scop3ptm.png',
      desc: 'Maps post-translational modifications onto protein structures for contextual, structure-aware analysis.',
      links: { github: 'https://github.com/compomics' },
      devs: ['pathmanaban', 'natalia']
    },
    {
      name: 'MLMarker', cat: 'biological', icon: 'bi-clipboard2-pulse', logo: 'mlmarker.png',
      desc: 'Machine-learning framework for tissue inference and biomarker discovery from proteomes.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/compomics',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1101/2025.06.10.658642',
      },
      devs: ['tine']
    },
    {
      name: 'ModPA', cat: 'biological', icon: 'bi-asterisk', logo: 'modpa.png',
      desc: 'Analyses associations between post-translational modifications to reveal PTM crosstalk and proteoforms.',
      links: { github: 'https://github.com/compomics' },
      devs: ['enrico']
    },
    {
      name: 'PTMVision', cat: 'biological', icon: 'bi-eye', logo: 'ptmvision.png',
      desc: 'Interactive web platform for exploratory visual analysis of post-translational modifications from mass spectrometry data.',
      links: {
        web: 'https://ptmvision-tuevis.cs.uni-tuebingen.de/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.4c00679',
      },
      devs: ['caro']
    },
    {
      name: 'E. coli PeptideAtlas Build', cat: 'biological', icon: 'bi-virus', logo: 'bacterium.png',
      desc:'Characterizing the observed Escherichia coli pan-proteome and its post-translational modifications.',
      links: {
        web: 'https://peptideatlas.org/builds/ecoli/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.5c00902'
        },
        devs: ['caro']
    },

    // ── Metaproteomics ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    {
      name: 'Peptonizer2000', cat: 'metaproteomics', icon: 'bi-virus', logo: 'peptonizer2000.png',
      desc: 'Bayesian taxon confidence scoring for metaproteomics from peptide-level evidence.',
      links: { github: 'https://github.com/compomics/Peptonizer2000' },
      devs: ['tim', 'pieter']
    },
    {
      name: 'Unipept', cat: 'metaproteomics', icon: 'bi-diagram-2', logo: 'unipept.png',
      desc: 'Tryptic-peptide-based taxonomic and functional analysis of metaproteome samples, with a public API.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/unipept/unipept',
        web: 'https://unipept.ugent.be/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/pr300576s',
      },
      devs: ['tim', 'pieter']
    }
  ];

  // ── Community projects — shown in a separate 2-column grid below the tools ────
  // Same fields as TOOLS (cat: 'community' for the accent/badge).
  const COMMUNITY = [
    {
      name: 'ProteoBench', cat: 'community', icon: 'bi-balloon', logo: 'proteobench.png',
      desc: 'Community-curated platform for comparing and benchmarking proteomics data analysis workflows.',
      note: 'A <a href="https://eubic-ms.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">EuBIC-MS</a> community initiative.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/Proteobench/ProteoBench',
        web: 'https://proteobench.cubimed.rub.de/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.64898/2025.12.09.692895',
      },
      devs: ['robbin', 'robbe', 'caro', 'sam']
    },
    {
      name: 'ProteomicsML', cat: 'community', icon: 'bi-journal-bookmark', logo: 'proteomicsml.svg',
      desc: 'Open, community-driven datasets and tutorials for machine learning on proteomics data.',
      note: 'Started at a 2022 <span class="tool-tile-note-hl">Lorentz Center</span> workshop.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/ProteomicsML/ProteomicsML',
        web: 'https://www.proteomicsml.org/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.2c00629',
      },
      devs: ['ralf', 'robbin']
    },
    {
      name: 'Rusteomics', cat: 'community', icon: 'bi-gear-wide-connected', logo: 'rusteomics.png',
      desc: 'Community effort building fast, reliable Rust libraries and tooling for mass spectrometry proteomics.',
      note: 'A <a href="https://eubic-ms.org" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">EuBIC-MS</a> community initiative.',
      links: {
        web: 'https://rusteomics.eubic-ms.org/',
      },
      devs: ['kevin', 'ralf']
    },
    {
      name: 'mzPeak', cat: 'community', icon: 'bi-layer-forward', logo: 'mzpeak.png',
      desc: 'A scalable, interoperable, and future-ready mass spectrometry data format.',
      note: 'A <a href="https://www.psidev.info/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">HUPO-PSI</a> community initiative.',
      links: {
        github: 'https://github.com/HUPO-PSI/mzPeak',
        web: 'https://www.mzpeak.org/',
        paper: 'https://doi.org/10.1021/acs.jproteome.5c00435',
      },
      devs: ['tim','ralf']
    },
    {
      name: 'PSI-AI', cat: 'community', icon: 'bi-filetype-ai',
      desc: 'Working group making proteomics data AI-ready and standardizing the use of AI in data analysis workflows.',
      note: 'A <a href="https://www.psidev.info/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">HUPO-PSI</a> community initiative.',
      links: {
        web: 'https://psi-ai.org/',
      },
      devs: ['ralf', 'tine', 'hari']
    }
  ];

  // ── Link button rendering ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const LINK_META = {
    github:   { icon: 'bi-github',            label: 'Code' },
    docs:     { icon: 'bi-book',              label: 'Docs' },
    pypi:     { icon: 'bi-box-seam',          label: 'PyPI' },
    bioconda: { icon: 'bi-cpu',               label: 'Bioconda' },
    web:      { icon: 'bi-globe',             label: 'Web app' },
    api:      { icon: 'bi-braces',            label: 'API' },
    paper:    { icon: 'bi-file-earmark-text', label: 'Paper', cls: 'tool-tile-link-paper' },
    tutorial: { icon: 'bi-mortarboard-fill',  label: 'Tutorial', cls: 'tool-tile-link-tutorial' }
  };

  const grid = document.getElementById('tools-grid');
  const countEl = document.getElementById('tools-count');
  const emptyEl = document.getElementById('tools-empty');
  const searchInput = document.getElementById('tools-search-input');
  const searchClear = document.getElementById('tools-search-clear');
  const chips = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.tools-chip'));

  function esc(s) {
    return String(s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, function (c) {
      return { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' }[c];
    });
  }

  function buildCard(tool, index) {
    const card = document.createElement('article');
    card.className = 'tool-tile';
    card.style.setProperty('--cat', 'var(--cat-' + tool.cat + ')');
    card.style.setProperty('--i', index);
    card.dataset.cat = tool.cat;
    card.dataset.haystack = (tool.name + ' ' + tool.desc + ' ' + (CATS[tool.cat] ? CATS[tool.cat].label : '')).toLowerCase();

    let html = '';

    // icon slot: tool logo if provided (falls back to the Bootstrap icon if the
    // image is missing/broken, via onerror stripping .has-logo), else the icon
    let iconInner = '<i class="bi ' + tool.icon + '"></i>';
    if (tool.logo) {
      iconInner = '<img src="../assets/images/tools/' + esc(tool.logo) + '" alt="' + esc(tool.name) + ' logo" '
        + 'onerror="this.remove(); this.closest(\'.tool-tile-icon\').classList.remove(\'has-logo\')">'
        + iconInner;
    }
    html += '<div class="tool-tile-top">'
      + '<span class="tool-tile-icon' + (tool.logo ? ' has-logo' : '') + '">' + iconInner + '</span>'
      + '<span class="tool-tile-cat">' + esc(CATS[tool.cat] ? CATS[tool.cat].label : tool.cat) + '</span>'
      + '</div>';

    html += '<h3 class="tool-tile-name">' + esc(tool.name) + '</h3>';
    html += '<p class="tool-tile-desc">' + esc(tool.desc) + '</p>';
    // optional small note (HTML allowed — authored here, e.g. a community link)
    if (tool.note) {
      html += '<p class="tool-tile-note">' + tool.note + '</p>';
    }

    // links — rendered in LINK_META key order (consistent everywhere; Paper then
    // Tutorial come last). Legacy `papers: [{url}]` maps to links.paper as a fallback.
    const links = Object.assign({}, tool.links);
    if (!links.paper && tool.papers && tool.papers.length) {
      links.paper = tool.papers[0].url;
    }
    let linksHtml = '';
    Object.keys(LINK_META).forEach(function (key) {
      if (links[key]) {
        const m = LINK_META[key];
        linksHtml += '<a class="tool-tile-link' + (m.cls ? ' ' + m.cls : '') + '" href="' + esc(links[key]) + '" title="' + m.label + '">'
          + '<i class="bi ' + m.icon + '"></i><span>' + m.label + '</span></a>';
      }
    });
    // "Coming soon" pill — sits where the links go, before any existing links
    if (tool.comingSoon) {
      linksHtml = '<span class="tool-tile-soon"><i class="bi bi-hourglass-split"></i>Coming soon</span>' + linksHtml;
    }

    html += '<div class="tool-tile-foot">';
    // devs (own row, above the links)
    if (tool.devs && tool.devs.length) {
      html += '<div class="tool-tile-devs" title="' + esc(tool.devs.join(', ')) + '">';
      tool.devs.slice(0, 4).forEach(function (key) {
        html += '<img class="tool-tile-dev" src="../assets/images/' + esc(key) + '.jpg" alt="" '
          + 'onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">';
      });
      html += '</div>';
    }
    html += '<div class="tool-tile-links">' + linksHtml + '</div>';
    html += '</div>';

    card.innerHTML = html;
    return card;
  }

  // initial render
  TOOLS.forEach(function (tool, i) { grid.appendChild(buildCard(tool, i)); });
  const cards = Array.from(grid.children);

  // community projects — separate static grid (not searched/filtered)
  const communityGrid = document.getElementById('community-grid');
  if (communityGrid) {
    COMMUNITY.forEach(function (tool, i) { communityGrid.appendChild(buildCard(tool, i)); });
  }

  // ── Filtering ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  let activeCat = 'all';
  let query = '';

  function applyFilter() {
    let visible = 0;
    cards.forEach(function (card) {
      const matchCat = activeCat === 'all' || card.dataset.cat === activeCat;
      const matchQuery = !query || card.dataset.haystack.indexOf(query) !== -1;
      const show = matchCat && matchQuery;
      card.classList.toggle('is-hidden', !show);
      if (show) { card.style.setProperty('--i', visible); visible += 1; }
    });
    countEl.textContent = visible + (visible === 1 ? ' tool' : ' tools');
    emptyEl.hidden = visible !== 0;
    grid.hidden = visible === 0;
  }

  chips.forEach(function (chip) {
    chip.addEventListener('click', function () {
      chips.forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove('is-active'); });
      chip.classList.add('is-active');
      activeCat = chip.dataset.cat;
      applyFilter();
    });
  });

  searchInput.addEventListener('input', function () {
    query = searchInput.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    searchClear.hidden = query === '';
    applyFilter();
  });

  searchClear.addEventListener('click', function () {
    searchInput.value = '';
    query = '';
    searchClear.hidden = true;
    searchInput.focus();
    applyFilter();
  });

  applyFilter();
})();
</script>
```
